//: Regression gate: type-check the emitted declarations under Node-style resolution (node16/nodenext) so a published consumer that does not set skipLibCheck cannot hit TS2834. Run after fix-dts-extensions.ts as part of the build. `types: ["node"]` - the streaming clients' public surface extends node:events' EventEmitter, so @types/node is a legitimate expectation for a Node>=22-only package, not just an implicit global.
